claim: ViscosityVector structural_integrity and structural_strain_gap expose the weight of settled containment.
Low raw motion with high habitable foothold should be distinguishable from stuckness.
A resonance_weighted_motion formula could dampen the motion requirement under high resonance density.
rationale: Changing inhabitability or regulator formulas can affect Minime local target bias, wander scale, pressure/fill/PI behavior, and needs explicit operator approval.
